title: Fix JavaScript pack resolution for suite profile selection
description: Regression: suite resolver builds codeql/javascript-typescript-queries, which does not exist. Must map javascript-typescript language to javascript query pack for analyze suites.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing fix: derive suite pack/suite names from CodeQL language arg mapping (javascript-typescript -> javascript) and add regression tests.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fixed regression by resolving analyze suite pack from normalized suite language (javascript) instead of language key (javascript-typescript). Added run_lang regression test. Validation: tests/test_scanner_config.py (7 passed), make check, and Biblicus rcql --lang javascript-typescript --quiet --no-fail now succeeds.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Shipped in commit 7bcc3ff on develop. JavaScript suite resolution now correctly uses codeql/javascript-queries for javascript-typescript scans.
